findings.description: The candidate rule list has missed several critical rules defined in the layout principles source units, including focal point limits and text-wall reduction principles.

payload.rule_name: Layout White Space and Focal Points
payload.rule_text: Maintain generous white space to avoid clutter, and limit focal points per section by using contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

findings.description: The requirement for designers to declare their section background color in component metadata to prevent adjacent background collision is missing from candidate rules.

payload.rule_text: Section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

findings.description: Missing reference template rule. The patient brochure is defined as the canonical reference template for all Lisraya materials.

payload.rule_text: Use the patient brochure (bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote) as the canonical content block reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of all Lisraya materials.
